title: WynnCraft: Nexus of Dark
description: A dark resource pack for WynnCraft's Raid "Orphion's Nexus of Light" to make it easier on the eyes and themed after the parasite.
body:
![Nexus of Dark palace from the outside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dedd0894bae9a93d71fd050f2cf3a5b090c87395.png)

This resourcepacks...
- Changes a majority of the blocks to be **darker** to make it **easier on the eyes** for extended periods of time
- Turns the color scheme of the environment more **purple**
- **Pumpkin!**

Make sure to only use this pack while doing the Nexus of Light raid because it changes a lot of the surroundings in unexpected ways.

Credits to:
- sadobunny for a bunch of help theming and taking screenshots
- Voidrim for the pumpkin mob totem model

The mod works best in conjunction with [Time Changer](https://modrinth.com/mod/time-changer) in order to force it to be night time permanently and disabling weather.

Enjoy nol lifing!
